idols.name: Seulgi
idols.description: Kang Seul-gi, known mononymously as Seulgi, is a South Korean singer and dancer. She is a member of the South Korean girl group Red Velvet, its sub-unit Red Velvet – Irene & Seulgi, and the supergroup Got the Beat.

idols.name: Irene
idols.description: Bae Joo-hyun, better known by her stage name Irene, is a South Korean singer and actress. She is best known as the member and leader of the South Korean girl group Red Velvet, and its sub-unit Red Velvet – Irene & Seulgi.

idols.name: Wendy
idols.description: Shon Seung-wan, known professionally as Wendy, is a South Korean singer. She is a member of the South Korean girl group Red Velvet. In 2021, she made her solo debut with the EP Like Water. In 2022, she became a member of SM Entertainment's supergroup Got the Beat.

idols.name: Joy
idols.description: Park Soo-young, better known by her stage name Joy, is a South Korean singer, actress, and host. She debuted as a member of South Korean girl group Red Velvet in August 2014.

idols.name: Yeri
idols.description: Kim Ye-rim, better known by her stage name Yeri, is a South Korean singer and actress. She is a member of South Korean girl group Red Velvet. She made her acting debut with the drama Blue Birthday. Aside from her music and acting career, Yeri hosted Show! Music Core and The Viewable SM.

idols.name: Chodan
idols.description: Chodan (쵸단) is a South Korean singer, musician, YouTuber and BJ under Tamago Production. She is the leader and drummer of the project girl band QWER.

idols.name: Magenta
idols.description: Lee Ahhee (이아희) or known by her stage name Magenta (마젠타) is the second revealed member of the South Korean girl band QWER. She is the bassist of the band.

idols.name: Hina
idols.description: Hina (히나) is a South Korean musician, Twitch streamer and cosplayer under Tamago Production. She is the guitarist, keyboardist and maknae of the girl band QWER.

idols.name: Siyeon
idols.description: Lee Siyeon (이시연) or better known by her stage name Siyeon (시연) is the fourth and final member of the South Korean girl band QWER. She serves as the main vocalist and occasionally a guitarist.

idols.name: Yeji
idols.description: Hwang Ye-ji, known mononymously as Yeji, is a South Korean singer and dancer. She is the leader of the South Korean girl group Itzy, formed by JYP Entertainment in 2019. Yeji released her debut solo extended play, Air, in March 2025.

idols.name: IU
idols.description: Lee Ji-eun, also known by her stage name IU, is a South Korean singer-songwriter and actress. She signed with LOEN Entertainment in 2007 as a trainee and debuted as a singer at the age of fifteen with the EP Lost and Found.

idols.name: Taeyeon
idols.description: Kim Tae-yeon, known mononymously as Taeyeon, is a South Korean singer. She debuted as a member of girl group Girls' Generation in August 2007, which went on to become one of the best-selling artists in South Korea and one of the most widely known K-pop groups worldwide.
